strategy: This is a raid DPS race with heavy anti-healing. Hunhau seeds Healing Traps and -50% Healing Charms on wizards and often heals himself 400 per round, so bring Doom and Gloom or infections to shut down his healing and Cleanse Charm to clear the anti-heal off your team.
Do not attack with Life; many of his cheats give himself a -80% Life Shield. Hit with Storm, Fire, Ice, Myth, or Balance instead.

Every round he casts one of six random elemental effects mixing a Fire DoT, a self-shield, a self-heal, or a Stormblade. Expect a self-blade or shield most rounds and strip or pierce before the hitter goes.
Cleanse the 250 Healing Traps off wizards before your healer acts, or heals get undercut.
Prepare for his end-of-round Death Meteor Strike that hits all wizards for 100% max health. Keep everyone shielded, absorbed, and topped when it looms.
Hitter funnels blades and bursts; supports strip his self-shields and blades; healer fights the anti-heal.
cheatNotes: Every round he fires one of the six elemental cheats below at a random wizard, so plan for a mix of self-buffs and anti-heal each turn.
His per-round cheat can land on any wizard, so nobody is safe from the healing debuffs.
Fire cheat: a 300 Fire DoT and a 250 Healing Trap on a wizard plus a 400 self-heal. Cleanse the trap and cut his heal.
Ice cheat: a Healing Trap on a wizard, a -80% Life Shield on himself, and a -50% Healing Charm on the wizard. Do not hit into that Life shield.
Storm cheat: a Stormblade on himself, a 400 self-heal, and a -50% Healing Charm on a wizard. Strip the blade before he swings.
Myth cheat: a 300 Fire DoT and Healing Trap on a wizard plus a -80% Life Shield on himself.
Life cheat: a Stormblade and self-heal for himself and a 300 Fire DoT on a wizard.
Death cheat: a Stormblade and -80% Life Shield on himself and a -50% Healing Charm on a wizard.
His end-of-round Death Meteor Strike hits every wizard for 100% max health. Be at full with shields up before it fires.
